founder.name: Vulchi Vijaya Kumar
founder.title: Founder & Visionary Leader
founder.bio: Driving India's renewable energy revolution with cutting-edge hybrid technology solutions that empower communities and businesses across the nation.

about.paragraph1: AeroSun Energy, a flagship innovation of Aerosun Energy, is India's first specialized manufacturer of portable and low-wind smart turbines. Founded by Vulchi Vijaya Kumar, Aerosun Energy is driven by the belief that clean wind energy should be accessible, affordable, and scalable — from rooftops in remote villages to commercial buildings in the heart of modern cities.
about.paragraph2: With strong roots in innovation, sustainability, and rural empowerment, Aerosun Energy designs advanced wind energy systems that operate silently, generate power at low wind speeds, and require minimal maintenance. Our solutions are built to perform reliably across diverse Indian environments.
about.quote: We don't just build turbines. We create a future where every citizen can produce their own clean energy.

coreValues.title: Sustainability
coreValues.desc: Accelerating India's transition to renewable energy by reducing carbon footprints through clean wind solutions.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.desc: Designing low-wind, smart, and efficient turbine technology tailored for real-world conditions.

coreValues.title: Accessibility
coreValues.desc: Making renewable energy affordable and easy to adopt for homes, businesses, and rural communities.

coreValues.title: Empowerment
coreValues.desc: Enabling energy independence and strengthening rural and urban economies alike.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.desc: Delivering quiet, durable, and low-maintenance systems that perform consistently over time.

about.techHeading: Hybrid Solar and Wind Energy System Overview
about.techSubheading: A hybrid platform designed to keep producing when single-source systems slow down.
about.techPara1: Our hybrid solar wind energy system combines photovoltaic solar panels and compact wind turbines into one integrated, intelligent power unit. Solar panels capture sunlight during the day while the wind turbines generate power continuously — day or night, rain or shine. Together, they complement each other perfectly: when solar output drops (overcast skies or night-time), wind steps in to fill the gap.
about.techPara2: The result is a smart energy system that delivers far more consistent power than either source alone. Paired with IoT-enabled monitoring and optional battery storage, you get real-time visibility and control over every kilowatt generated — the foundation of India's green energy infrastructure.
about.techPara3: AeroSun Energy designs and installs tailored renewable energy solutions across India — for homes, businesses, public spaces, and large-scale infrastructure — making clean, affordable power accessible to everyone.
techPoints: Dual-source generation that reduces idle periods.
Smart controls that balance solar, wind, and storage.
Scalable deployment from home rooftops to public assets.
about.techImageCaption: Hybrid systems engineered for dependable output, smart monitoring, and scalable installations.

howItWorks.heading: How Hybrid Solar Wind Systems Work
howItWorks.description: From site visit to 24/7 power generation — here's how we turn any location into a clean energy source with our solar wind hybrid system.
howItWorks.nextGenCaption: Our cutting-edge hybrid systems combine the latest in solar photovoltaic technology with advanced vertical-axis wind turbines, creating a seamless energy generation platform that adapts to any environment.

steps.title: Site Assessment
steps.description: Our engineers visit your location — rooftop, road, park, or open land — to measure sunlight exposure, wind patterns, and available space. This data shapes a system perfectly tuned to your site.

steps.title: Custom System Design
steps.description: We design a hybrid solar wind energy system tailored for your energy needs and budget. Solar panels are oriented for maximum daylight capture while wind turbines are sized and positioned to harvest wind around the clock.

steps.title: Installation
steps.description: Our certified installation team sets up the solar panels, wind turbines, smart inverters, and optional battery storage — all integrated into one unified green energy system with zero disruption to your operations.

steps.title: Smart Monitoring
steps.description: An IoT-enabled dashboard gives you real-time visibility into power generation, consumption, and savings — from your phone or computer. The system auto-optimises output between solar and wind at all times.

steps.title: Continuous Power, Minimal Maintenance
steps.description: Once live, your hybrid system generates electricity day and night with minimal maintenance. Solar works hardest in daylight; wind covers the rest. Together, they deliver continuous, reliable power to support sustainable infrastructure.

items.title: 24/7 Power Generation
items.desc: Solar and wind working together ensures continuous electricity day and night, even during cloudy or calm periods.

items.title: Smart Grid Integration
items.desc: IoT-enabled controllers seamlessly feed surplus energy back to the grid and manage load balancing in real time.

items.title: Low Maintenance
items.desc: Minimal moving parts and self-cleaning panel coatings keep operational costs low with rare service intervals.

items.title: Scalable Installation
items.desc: From a single rooftop kit to a multi-megawatt commercial array, our modular design scales with your energy needs.

items.title: Eco-Friendly
items.desc: Zero direct emissions during operation, recyclable components, and a lifecycle carbon footprint far below fossil fuels.

items.title: Efficient Land Use
items.desc: Hybrid systems generate more energy per square metre, reducing land requirements compared to standalone solar or wind farms.

useCases.heading: Hybrid Solar Wind Use Cases in India
useCases.description: Our hybrid solar wind energy systems are engineered for diverse environments — from busy highways to quiet homes — bringing renewable energy solutions across India wherever they're needed most.

items.title: Smart Energy Roads & Highways
items.description: Roads and highways are exposed to sunlight and wind 24 hours a day. AeroSun integrates solar panels into road surface barriers and wind turbines along medians and roadsides — turning every kilometre of highway into a green energy generator that powers streetlights, traffic systems, and EV charging stations.

items.title: Public Parks & Open Spaces
items.description: Parks offer unobstructed sunlight and natural airflow. Our aesthetically designed flower turbines and solar canopies blend seamlessly into park landscapes, powering benches, Wi-Fi nodes, lighting, and event spaces — supporting sustainable urban infrastructure without disrupting the natural environment.
points: Ideal for urban and suburban parks

items.title: Residential Rooftops
items.description: Our solar wind hybrid system for homes combines compact rooftop solar panels with low-wind VAWT turbines — delivering round-the-clock electricity. Homeowners can cut their bills drastically, store surplus energy, and even sell power back to the grid through net metering.
points: Up to 80% reduction in electricity bills

items.title: Open Land & Commercial Spaces
items.description: Open agricultural land, factory rooftops, warehouses, and commercial complexes represent ideal sites for large-scale hybrid deployments. AeroSun delivers scalable green energy infrastructure that offsets industrial power demands and accelerates compliance with sustainability targets.
points: Suitable for rural and urban commercial sites

benefits.heading: Benefits of Hybrid Solar Wind Energy
benefits.imageCaption: Our Darrieus turbines utilize aerodynamic lift principles for superior efficiency in variable wind conditions, making them perfect for India's diverse climate zones.

items.title: Significant Cost Savings
items.desc: Dramatically reduce your electricity bills from day one. Most systems pay for themselves within 4–6 years through energy savings and government incentives.

items.title: Sustainability
items.desc: Every kilowatt-hour of renewable energy generated directly reduces carbon emissions, helping India meet its net-zero targets and preserving the environment.

items.title: Energy Independence
items.desc: Break free from grid outages and rising utility tariffs. Generate your own clean power and take full control of your energy future.

items.title: Continuous Power Supply
items.desc: The hybrid solar + wind architecture ensures power availability around the clock — sunshine or overcast, calm or windy, day or night.

services.heading: Hybrid Energy Solutions for Homes and Businesses
services.imageCaption: Our state-of-the-art manufacturing processes ensure every component meets the highest standards of quality and durability, from turbine blades to solar panel integration.
services.learnMoreTitle: Learn more about AeroSun Energy services
services.learnMoreAriaLabel: Contact us to learn more about our services

items.title: Significant Cost Savings
items.description: Our hybrid solar wind energy systems can cut electricity bills by up to 80%. With government subsidies, net metering, and rapid ROI, switching to green energy has never made more financial sense.

items.title: Eco-Friendly Zero-Emission Power
items.description: Every kilowatt from AeroSun replaces fossil-fuel electricity — reducing carbon emissions, improving local air quality, and contributing directly to India's renewable energy goals. Clean energy for a cleaner future.

items.title: Smart IoT Monitoring
items.description: Our smart energy systems come with real-time IoT dashboards so you can track solar output, wind generation, consumption, and savings from anywhere. Data-driven decisions, maximum efficiency.

items.title: Low Maintenance, High Reliability
items.description: Engineered for durability, our systems require minimal upkeep. With self-starting wind rotors and weather-resistant solar panels, AeroSun installations run reliably in urban rooftops, rural fields, highways, and parks alike.

items.title: Efficient Use of Space
items.description: Hybrid systems generate more energy per square metre than standalone solar or wind alone — ideal for space-constrained sites like urban rooftops, roadside infrastructure, and compact commercial plots.

windGenerators.heading: Wind Turbines for Hybrid Solar Wind Systems
windGenerators.description: We offer a full spectrum of wind generators — from conventional three-blade turbines to innovative flower turbines and minimal-airflow vertical-axis rotors — so every site gets the right technology.
windGenerators.getQuoteTitle: Get a quote for AeroSun Energy wind generators
windGenerators.getQuoteAriaLabel: Request a quote for this wind generator model

items.title: H-Darrieus Turbine
items.subtitle: Urban Corridors & Mid-Wind Sites
items.description: The H-Darrieus turbine uses lift-driven vertical blades to capture wind efficiently without needing active yaw control. It performs reliably in variable urban and semi-urban airflow, making it suitable for highway edges, industrial plots, and compact utility installations.
highlights: Performs in 3 to 8 m/s wind zones

items.title: Helical Flower Turbine
items.subtitle: Urban Rooftops & Quiet Environments
items.description: Flower turbines feature multiple helical petal-shaped blades arranged symmetrically around a vertical axis, resembling a blooming flower in motion. They capture wind from any horizontal direction without requiring a yaw mechanism, making them ideal for turbulent urban airflows. Their low rotational noise and elegant appearance suit rooftop installations, parks, and environmentally sensitive areas.

items.title: Savonius VAWT
items.subtitle: Low Wind Speed & Off-Grid Sites
items.description: The Savonius vertical-axis wind turbine uses two or more curved bucket-shaped scoops mounted on a vertical shaft. The differential drag between the concave and convex faces causes rotation even at very low wind speeds, making it self-starting without any external mechanism. Perfect for remote off-grid locations, hilly terrain, and areas with inconsistent or low-velocity wind resources where conventional turbines cannot operate efficiently.

items.title: Rooftop Smart VAWT
items.subtitle: Homes, Apartments & Terrace Retrofits
items.description: Rooftop VAWTs are designed for dense urban settings where space and noise matter. Combined with rooftop solar, they extend generation windows beyond daylight and help homes or small facilities improve self-consumption and bill savings.

items.title: Certified Expert Team
items.desc: Our engineers and energy consultants are certified specialists in hybrid solar wind energy systems with proven installations across urban and rural India.

items.title: Innovative Smart Systems
items.desc: Every AeroSun installation includes IoT-enabled monitoring, smart inverters, and AI-assisted output optimisation — true smart energy systems built for the future.

items.title: Fully Scalable Solutions
items.desc: From a single-home solar wind hybrid system to city-wide green energy infrastructure, our modular architecture scales effortlessly to match any project size or budget.

items.title: Reliable 24/7 Support
items.desc: Round-the-clock customer support and a rapid-response maintenance team ensure your hybrid energy system always runs at full capacity — no downtime, no surprises.

cta.heading: Plan a hybrid solar wind system that fits your site.
cta.description: We assess the site, match the right solar and turbine mix, and design for the way your location actually behaves. Homes, public projects, and commercial deployments all need different answers.
